I used the OpenWeather API and created a chat interface where the GPT-3.5 turbo LLM answers natural language queries about current weather and 5-day forecasts for any city name or zip code with country name.

CodePori, is a novel model designed to automate code generation for extensive and complex software projects based on natural language prompts. We employ LLM-based multi- AI agents to handle creative and challenging tasks in autonomous software development.

A hands-on learning repository for mastering LangGraph — the framework for building graph-based, stateful LLM workflows. This repo includes step-by-step examples, exercises, and project-based modules using LangGraph and LangChain to build intelligent multi-agent systems.

Elevate your projects with the fastest & most powerful text to speech & voice API. Quickly generate AI voices in multiple languages for your chatbots, agents, LLMs, websites, apps and more. ElevenLabs's Java SDK generated by Konfig (https://konfigthis.com/).

Factify is an AI agent application developed during a hackathon to address the low reader confidence in European journalism. Our solution aggregates articles from various sources and uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to synthesize a comprehensive, unbiased story for the user.

In this prototype, we have demonstrated that local LLMs are feasible. Persona is built on your data and autonomously trains on it. We are currently developing a more advanced version with AI agents fully based on your data and local machines.

A comprehensive toolkit for volunteers participating in Robert F Kennedy Jr.'s 2024 presidential campaign. This repository includes tools, scripts, LLM agent resources, prompts, and documentation designed to empower our team with the technology and information needed to support a successful campaign.

Proof-of-concept for a multi-agent system that leverages transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) to autonomously script functional programs for the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM). The goal is to design these programs within specified operational constraints while achieving targeted performance metrics.

Rixy AI serves as a cutting-edge LLM application development platform. By integrating AI workflow, RAG pipeline, agent capabilities, model management, observability features, and other functionalities, the Rixy interface empowers users to seamlessly transition from prototype to production in a swift manner.

DataSage is a project that implements a Natural Language Query Agent designed to answer questions based on various types of documents, including lecture notes, articles, and tables. The system leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) and vector indexing frameworks for query processing and response generation.

The Resistance require players to deduce roles, bluff, cooperate with teammates, and strategize against opponents. Nexus框架的设计目标是成为一个​​模块化、可扩展、生产就绪​​的Agent开发基础。它应遵循以下核心原则：  ​​开箱即用 (Out-of-the-box)​​: 提供大多数Agent应用所需的通用模块（如记忆、工具调用、规划），开发者只需关注业务逻辑。  ​​约定优于配置 (Convention over Configuration)​​: 定义一套标准的项目结构和开发规范，降低决策成本。  ​​技术栈中立 (Tech-Stack Neutral)​​: 核心架构不绑定特定LLM或数据库，通过适配器模式兼容主流服务。  ​​面向生产 (Production-Ready)​​: 内置错误处理、日志、监控、测试等支撑设施，确保应用健壮性。
